Metadata.title: Oilix — engine oils for your car
Metadata.description: Selection by make and engine, delivery to your door, genuine products and clear retail prices for private customers.

hero.title: Engine oils for your car — with expert selection, delivery and peace of mind
hero.lead: Shop as a private customer: clear descriptions, help with specs and viscosity, orders from a single canister. No wholesale jargon — only what your car and budget need.

audience.title: Oilix is a fit if you…
audience.lead: You drive your own car and want to buy oil with confidence — not by guesswork or a random forum tip.
points: You want to buy oil without guessing on the shelf — with guidance on viscosity and approvals for your engine
You drive in the city and on the highway and do not want to overpay for a “universal” that does not suit your engine
You prefer to order online and receive your order by courier or pickup point
You want to know the canister is genuine and within date — no suspicious grey-market batches

pillars.title: Three directions in one store
pillars.lead: Pick an area first — engine, transmission or related fluids. It is easier than drowning in SKUs and faster to fill your cart.

items.title: Engine oils
items.body: Synthetic and semi-synthetic for petrol and diesel: from city traffic to long trips — we help with ACEA/API classes and manufacturer approvals.

items.title: Gearbox and axles
items.body: Fluids for automatic, CVT, DCT, transfer case and axle — so you do not mix incompatible products and damage a unit.

items.title: Fluids and extras in one order
items.body: Brake fluid, washer, coolant, filters — get everything for a service in one cart instead of running from store to store.

quality.title: Why you can trust authenticity
quality.lead: We work with official supply chains and store products so shelf life and storage conditions are never a surprise at the next change.
bullets: Selection by make and engine — we explain why this viscosity and class fit
Fair retail pricing: you see the price upfront, with no hidden volume-based rules
Support in chat or by phone if you hesitate between two options
quality.quote: «The most expensive mistake is not the price per can — it is the wrong oil for your engine. Five minutes on selection beats a week in the workshop.»
quality.quoteFooter: For owners of passenger cars, crossovers and family vehicles who want to drive calmly and know what is under the hood.

catalog.title: How the catalog is organized
catalog.lead: Open a block — short, practical notes on what to consider before buying for typical driving scenarios.

blocks.title: 01 — Passenger cars
items: Selection by make, model and year — fewer mistakes on 5W-30, 5W-40, etc.
Turbos, diesel particulate filters and GPF — we explain in plain language why Low SAPS matters
Change intervals: what the manufacturer typically assumes and what changes with your driving style

blocks.title: 02 — Crossovers and family cars
items: Larger engines and loads — when reserve for temperature and oil film stability matters more
All-wheel drive and transfer case: what to watch when choosing fluids for winter and light off-road
Convenient can sizes: 4 L, 5 L or 1 L packs — so you never have too little or too much left for a top-up

blocks.title: 03 — Beyond engine oil
items: Oil and air filters — we remind you to replace them with the oil
Season: all-season oil vs winter viscosity — what makes sense for your region
Before you buy: send VIN or service book notes — we will help with compatibility

products.title: Product catalog
products.lead: 20 demo items — images are placeholders until real photos are connected.

contact.title: Order or ask about selection
contact.lead: Tell us your make, model and year — or what you are already looking at in the catalog. We will reply with options and delivery timing. You can later wire the form to email, messenger or CRM.
contact.consent: By submitting the form you agree to the processing of personal data — replace with text that matches your privacy policy.

footer.copyright: © {year} Oilix. A store for private customers.

Delivery.metaDescription: Shipping with Nova Poshta and Ukrposhta across Ukraine. Branches, parcel lockers and convenient pickup.
Delivery.title: Delivery across Ukraine
Delivery.lead: We ship orders via Nova Poshta and Ukrposhta. Choose a convenient pickup option — or tell us your preference and we will suggest the best fit.
Delivery.novaLead: Popular for cities and towns with branches and parcel lockers.
novaPoints: Tracking in the Nova Poshta app and on the website
Courier delivery where the service is available
Cash on delivery or prepayment — agreed per order
Delivery.ukrposhtaLead: Delivery via Ukrposhta: branches in cities and villages, standard operator rates apply.
ukrposhtaPoints: Timeframes and cost confirmed when you place an order
Pickup at a branch or an agreed delivery option
Delivery.note: Exact timelines, rates and weight/size limits are confirmed when you place your order.

PublicOffer.metaDescription: Public offer of the Oilix online store: terms of sale, delivery, payment, warranty and returns.
PublicOffer.title: Public offer (contract)
PublicOffer.subtitle: Retail sale agreement via the Oilix website. Seller details and contacts are published on the Website.

Returns.metaDescription: Oilix returns and exchange: 14-day rule, required documents, rules for Nova Poshta orders. Link to the Law of Ukraine on consumer protection.
Returns.title: Returns & exchange
Returns.subtitle: Exchange / return of goods
introSteps: Make sure no more than 14 days have passed since the date of purchase.
Contact Oilix using the details on the Website or those provided when you placed your order.
documents: Proof of purchase (cash receipt or sales invoice).
Returns.rulesLead: At Oilix, an exchange is possible if:
rulesBullets: you have a cash receipt (sales invoice) for the purchase;

the product and its packaging retain their merchantable condition: no mechanical damage, scratches or scuffs; for items in disposable (blister) packaging — the packaging must be unopened and undamaged;
the product shows no signs of use.
Returns.deliveryNote: For exchange or return of goods delivered by Nova Poshta, use the contacts published on the Website or leave a request via the contact block on the home page.
Returns.lawLead: Consumer rights are governed by the laws of Ukraine, including:
Returns.lawLinkLabel: Law of Ukraine “On Consumer Protection” of 12.05.1991 No. 1023-XII

Cart.metaDescription: Your Oilix cart: change quantities, review the total and place an order.
Cart.title: Cart
Cart.lead: Items are saved in your browser. Complete your order via the contact section on the home page.
Cart.inCartHint: In the cart — adjust quantity or proceed to checkout.
Cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Add items from the catalog.

Product.lead: Check the specs before ordering. Need advice — use the form below.
